claims.text: Devin Marsh is the founder and CEO of Corevance.
Devin Marsh worked as an Infrastructure Engineer at Stripe from 2017 to 2020.
claims.evidence: Public professional profile: Devin Marsh — Infrastructure Engineer at Stripe, full-time from 2017 to mid-2020.

claims.text: Devin Marsh founded DataLoom in March 2019.
claims.evidence: Prior startup: DataLoom (data-pipeline tooling). Founded March 2019; served as full-time CEO.

claims.text: DataLoom was acquired by Cisco in 2021.
claims.evidence: Reviewed Cisco's 2021 acquisition announcements: DataLoom does NOT appear among them.
EDGAR full-text search for a Form D filing for DataLoom's claimed $4M seed round: NO filing found.

claims.text: Devin Marsh appeared as a speaker at QCon SF in November 2018 while affiliated with Stripe.
claims.evidence: Conference talk 'Building Reliable Payment Ledgers', QCon SF, November 2018. Speaker: Devin Marsh, affiliation Stripe.

claims.text: Devin Marsh appeared as a speaker at Strange Loop in September 2019 while affiliated with Stripe.
claims.evidence: Conference talk 'Infra at Scale', Strange Loop, September 2019. Speaker: Devin Marsh, affiliation Stripe.

claims.text: No public employment or education claims found beyond those verified.
